title: Differential Drive Kinematics and Turning Radius
content: A two-wheeled differential robot turns by varying left/right wheel speeds. Turning radius R = L*(vR+vL)/(2*(vR-vL)) where L is the wheelbase. A* cell transitions map to (turn, forward) motor command sequences. Heading integrates encoder delta-counts: Δθ = (ΔR-ΔL)/wheel_base_ticks.
